ms_newcharts

Class Ms2chart

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window
          • java.awt.Frame
            • javax.swing.JFrame
              • ms_newcharts.Ms2chart
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.RootPaneContainer, javax.swing.WindowConstants

    public class Ms2chart
extends javax.swing.JFrame
    The Chart Program for MS2 output files. Released under LGPL. For complete license, see copying.txt. Alternatively visit: http://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl.html

    NOTE:
    1. The panel which holds the chart has to be BorderLayout. In NetBeans 5.0, right-click on the panel and select BorderLayout.
    2. It is important to note that RUN files are treated first than RAV file. This is to simplify the algorithm.

    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String addLinebreaks(java.lang.String input, int maxLineLength)
      To add line breaks after every specified characters length Input: String which needed to be break in line maxLineLength: maximum length specified to break the line
      static int binarySearch(int[] arrayOfInts, int intToBeFound)
      Performs the standard binary search using two comparisons per level.

      Show open dialog, Set user Directory, Populate combo box, Enable and disable UI accordingly

      Set minimum and maximum value for the x-axis
      private void buttonYAxisChangeActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      Set minimum and maximum value for the y-axis
      private java.lang.StringBuffer calcTowrite(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> frmdata, double vol, int frmrows, int frmnum)
      Calculates the first character for every line in .xyz file from the strings of predefined characters.
      private void calcTypes(java.lang.StringBuffer lineData, int rows)
      Prepare arrays of Type, X , Y, Z, Sigma and Columns from the data in the start of the .vim file
      private double[][] calnorm(java.lang.String[] numb)
      Some calculations for the norm.
      private int[] calntypes(java.lang.String[] type)
      Calculate the N number of types from the Types array.

      int findIndexOfLargestInt(int[] arrayOfInts)
      Returns the index of the largest integer in the given array of type Integer.

      Check and save the length of each data block contained in a file.

      Check and save the indexes of the splited blocks of data contained in a file
      private java.lang.String getAverageRTR()
      Read the value for the acf with the help of .res file
      private java.lang.String[] getDirList()
      Setting the appropriate filter and getting the list of specified files
      private java.lang.String getError(java.lang.String titleSelected)
      Reading the errors for specified title with the help of .res file.
      private java.lang.String[] getListOfXAxises()
      Retrieve all the titles for x-axis from the array of file data
      private java.lang.String[] getListOfYAxises()
      Retrieve all the titles for y-axis from the array of file data
      private void getnumofsites(java.lang.String[] type, java.lang.String[] X, java.lang.String[] Y, java.lang.String[] Z, java.lang.String[] Col)
      Get the number of sites into the global arrays and use it later.

      Prepare and open help file.
      private void initComponents()
      This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
      private void listYAxisesValueChanged(javax.swing.event.ListSelectionEvent evt)
      Y-Axis control event handler Checks different user input condition set the title for x-axis Prepare the arrays for calculations and calls plot function accordingly
      static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
      main function for Ms2chart.
      private void plot()
      Prepare the series collection with the array of file data also, the arrays for the error bars according to the specified cases and pass it to the JFreechart liberary function to actually plot the data Change the titles into more readable title for y-axis.
      private void prepareData()
      Open file according to the specified case and enable/disable specified controls
      private void rbDCPActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      DCP radio button event handler
      private void rbRTRActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      RTR radio button event handler Enable and disable UI controls depending upon condition
      private void rbRUN_RAVActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      RUN radio button event handler Enable and disable UI controls depending upon condition.
      private void rbTHIActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      THI radio button event handler
      private java.lang.String[][] readFileIn2DStringArray(java.lang.String fileName)
      Read the specified file data in two dimensional string according to the different cases.
      private void readHelpxlsxfile()
      Read help file from the help folder Find the "Name" & "Meaning" coloumn inside the help xlsx file (we need only these two) populate the hashmap (helpMap) to save all the names and meanings Key: Text from the "Name" column Value: Text from the "Meaning"" column.
      private boolean Readvimfile(java.lang.String fileName, java.lang.String casetitle)
      Read vim file frame vise and write frame data in a seperate files (.xyz) in a specific folder.
      private void setLabelStatusMessage(java.lang.String statusMessage) 
      private void setRangeIndexForErrors()
      Setting the range for the errors
      (package private) void settitleXAxis(java.lang.String Otitle)
      Set the proper title along the x-axis.
      private void settooltipforlabels()
      Get all the label and buttons from the UI Assign tool tip from the populated hashMap (helpmap) Call addlinebreaks function to make tool tip in paragraph form use html tags inside tool tip to formate paragrah form.
      private void setwindowsize()
      Set the initial size of the window according to the resolution of the screen.

      Write .xyz file into the specified directory

    • Constructor Detail

      • Ms2chart

        public Ms2chart()
        Does initialization.

    • Method Detail

      • findIndexOfLargestInt

        public int findIndexOfLargestInt(int[] arrayOfInts)
        Returns the index of the largest integer in the given array of type Integer.

        For example,

        int[] a1 = { 0, 1, 2, 100, 4, 50, 22 };
        int i = findIndexOfLargestInt(a1); // i = 2
        System.out.println(a1[i]); // ai[i] = 100

        Parameters:
        arrayOfInts - Array of the set of integers.
        Returns:
        The index of the largest integer in the input array arrayOfInts.

      • binarySearch

        public static int binarySearch(int[] arrayOfInts,
               int intToBeFound)
        Performs the standard binary search using two comparisons per level.
        Parameters:
        arrayOfInts -
        intToBeFound -
        Returns:
        The index where the item is found, or -1.

      • settooltipforlabels

        private void settooltipforlabels()
        Get all the label and buttons from the UI Assign tool tip from the populated hashMap (helpmap) Call addlinebreaks function to make tool tip in paragraph form use html tags inside tool tip to formate paragrah form.

      • addLinebreaks

        public java.lang.String addLinebreaks(java.lang.String input,
                             int maxLineLength)
        To add line breaks after every specified characters length Input: String which needed to be break in line maxLineLength: maximum length specified to break the line
        Parameters:
        input - Help string
        maxLineLength - Length of the line
        Returns:
        Formatted String

      • readHelpxlsxfile

        private void readHelpxlsxfile()
        Read help file from the help folder Find the "Name" & "Meaning" coloumn inside the help xlsx file (we need only these two) populate the hashmap (helpMap) to save all the names and meanings Key: Text from the "Name" column Value: Text from the "Meaning"" column.

      • initComponents

        private void initComponents()
        This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form. WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always regenerated by the Form Editor.

        Set the initial size of the window according to the resolution of the screen.

      • Readvimfile

        private boolean Readvimfile(java.lang.String fileName,
                  java.lang.String casetitle)
        Read vim file frame vise and write frame data in a seperate files (.xyz) in a specific folder.
        Parameters:
        fileName - Name of the file
        casetitle - Case which is opened by the user
        Returns:
        True - False
        See Also:
        calcTowrite(java.util.ArrayList, double, int, int), writexyzfiles(java.lang.StringBuffer, java.lang.String)

      • calcTypes

        private void calcTypes(java.lang.StringBuffer lineData,
             int rows)
        Prepare arrays of Type, X , Y, Z, Sigma and Columns from the data in the start of the .vim file
        Parameters:
        lineData - Data from start of the frame
        rows - Number of rows
        See Also:
        Readvimfile(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)

      • calcTowrite

        private java.lang.StringBuffer calcTowrite(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> frmdata,
                                 double vol,
                                 int frmrows,
                                 int frmnum)
        Calculates the first character for every line in .xyz file from the strings of predefined characters.
        Parameters:
        frmdata - Frame data
        vol - Volume of a frame. (In the start of the frame)
        frmrows - Number of rows
        frmnum - Number of the current frame
        Returns:
        StringBuffer (Data prepared to be written)
        See Also:
        Readvimfile(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)

      • getnumofsites

        private void getnumofsites(java.lang.String[] type,
                 java.lang.String[] X,
                 java.lang.String[] Y,
                 java.lang.String[] Z,
                 java.lang.String[] Col)

        Parameters:
        type -
        X -
        Y -
        Z -
        Col -
        See Also:
        calcTypes(java.lang.StringBuffer, int)

      • calntypes

        private int[] calntypes(java.lang.String[] type)
        Calculate the N number of types from the Types array.
        Parameters:
        type - Array of types
        Returns:
        Array of int
        See Also:
        getnumofsites(java.lang.String[], java.lang.String[], java.lang.String[], java.lang.String[], java.lang.String[])

        Returns:
        Two Dimensional array of string
        See Also:
        prepareData()

        Returns:
        Array of indexes

                             int[] arrayOfFileStartingIndices)

        arrayOfFileStartingIndices - Array of indexes

        See Also:

      • setRangeIndexForErrors

        private void setRangeIndexForErrors()
        Setting the range for the errors

      • plot

        private void plot()
        Prepare the series collection with the array of file data also, the arrays for the error bars according to the specified cases and pass it to the JFreechart liberary function to actually plot the data Change the titles into more readable title for y-axis.

      • getError

        private java.lang.String getError(java.lang.String titleSelected)
        Reading the errors for specified title with the help of .res file.
        Parameters:
        titleSelected - Selected title
        Returns:
        Error

        Read the value for the acf with the help of .res file
        Returns:
